TONIK's Collection

TONIK curates a portfolio of boutique properties across Sri Lanka, each chosen for its distinct sense of place and its ability to reveal the island's natural beauty, culture, and warmth to discerning travellers. From design-led coastal retreats to characterful island bungalows, every TONIK property is shaped around slow, considered hospitality — spaces where guests can unwind fully, connect with authentic Sri Lankan experiences, and enjoy a level of personalised care that comes from genuine local knowledge and thoughtful design.

KAHA

Tucked away in the coastal village of Talpe, just a short stroll from the famed Talpe Natural Pools, Villa KAHA is a quiet sanctuary shaped by colour, light, and meaning. Set on 14 perches of land, the 400 sqm villa takes its name from "Kaha" — the Sinhala word for yellow and the golden hue of turmeric — a spice that symbolises purity, renewal, and warmth in Sri Lankan life. Sun-washed yellow exteriors and soft golden accents carry the glow of "Hiru eliya" ("sunlight," from hiru — sun, and eliya — light) throughout this intimate four-room retreat.

Thalpe, Galle — The South
👥 Sleeps 8🛏 4 Bedrooms🛁 4 Bathrooms
Learn more

Villa Sayura

Where the Indian Ocean meets effortless modern living, Villa Sayura rests along the quiet shores of Boossa — just minutes from Galle Fort, yet blissfully tucked away. Set on 8 perches of land, the 350 sqm villa opens straight onto the beach, with breezy communal spaces and a private jacuzzi where the sky turns gold each evening. It's a soulful Sri Lankan escape, where the ocean sets the pace and every moment feels naturally yours.

Boossa, Galle — The South
👥 Sleeps 6🛏 2 Bedrooms🛁 2 Bathrooms
Learn more

Garfield Bungalow

A legacy of tea, reimagined — Garfield Bungalow is a beautifully preserved colonial-era planter's bungalow set within a working tea estate in the hill country of Haputale. Spanning 1,200 sqm, its spacious suites are warmed by crackling fireplaces, with windows framing misty tea gardens that stretch as far as the eye can see. Perfect for families, it blends history, nature, and effortless living — where the story of Sri Lanka's tea country becomes your own.

Haputale, Badulla — Hill Country
👥 Sleeps 12🛏 4 Bedrooms🛁 5 Bathrooms
Learn more

Garfield Cottage

An intimate sanctuary in the clouds, Garfield Cottage rests quietly along the misty hills of Haputale, sharing the same tea estate as its neighbouring Garfield Bungalow. Spanning 600 sqm, this cosy retreat offers sweeping views of Sri Lanka's tea country, cool mountain air, and warm evenings by the fireplace. It's a romantic hill country escape, where the mist rolls in softly and time slows down just for you.

Haputale, Badulla — Hill Country
👥 Sleeps 6🛏 3 Bedrooms🛁 3 Bathrooms
Learn more
